hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.py$') { Push-Location "$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend"; uv run ruff format $f 2>$null; Pop-Location } elseif ($f -match '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$') { Push-Location "$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend"; pnpm exec prettier --write $f 2>$null; Pop-Location }
